items.title: Israel seizes castle in Lebanon as it expands ground offensive
items.dek: The Israeli military says everyone south of the Zahrani river should leave, after it captured the strategic Beaufort Castle.
items.body: The Israeli military says everyone south of the Zahrani river should leave, after it captured the strategic Beaufort Castle.

items.title: Nigerian retired general abducted with his wife in the north-west
